title: desmodium duclouxii var. henryi
intro: Desmodium duclouxii var. henryi is a plant species, commonly referred to as Henry's tick trefoil, which is a variant of the Desmodium duclouxii plant. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Desmodium duclouxii var. henryi include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying and processing the leaves, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
